title: Don't miss the last two Carpe Musicam! concerts of the year
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Be sure to attend the...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Be sure to attend the Garden Route's Carpe Musicam! Orchestra and Choir's last two concerts of 2024 today, Friday 13 December, and on Sunday.

They will be performing their Ode to Joy Christmas concert today at 19:00 in the Outeniqua High School Hall in George and on Sunday at 18:00 in the Mossel Bay Town Hall.

Reserve your place now at: www.carpemusicam.co.za.

Tickets are priced at R150 for adults and R50 for learners. For more details, email [email protected].

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
